evals.prompt: My course progress disappeared after updating insight-wave
evals.expected_output: Detects stale cogni-teacher.local.md file, suggests renaming to cogni-help.local.md

evals.prompt: cogni-marketing isn't working, it says it can't find portfolio data
evals.expected_output: Checks cross-plugin dependency: cogni-marketing requires cogni-portfolio. Verifies cogni-portfolio is installed and has data

evals.prompt: Run a full diagnostic on my setup
evals.expected_output: Runs all checks (marketplace, plugin integrity, state files, dependencies, environment) and presents summary table
